current_phase: Phase 15 COMPLETE — In-Clinic Visit Flow Redesign
key_decisions: Step 1 split into 1A (modality auto-advance) and 1B (specialty selection) — eliminates bundled decision confusion
Soft delete for doctor deactivation — auth user preserved, history migrated on re-add
Slots compiled at query time from session configs via getDaySlots()
All redesign work is frontend only unless explicitly flagged
getPatientAppointments() server action bypassed RLS read block securely to populate doctor metadata on client
Self-Healing active doctors list query robustly falls back if is_active column is missing in hosted database
